answers: A green building is designed to reduce its environmental impact through energy efficiency, water conservation, sustainable materials, and better indoor air quality throughout its lifecycle.
Green building holo environment friendly building design kora. Solar panel, rainwater harvesting, natural ventilation — sob use kore energy ar resource save kora hoy.
Green buildings use strategies like solar panels, green roofs, efficient insulation, recycled materials, and smart HVAC systems. LEED and BREEAM are popular green building certifications.
Green buildings reduce energy consumption by 25-50% compared to conventional buildings. They also improve occupant health and productivity while reducing water usage and waste.
